scene.description: The off-record layer — the pieces the Archive discarded before filing. Maya stands closer here than usual. These were never meant to be reviewed.

fragments.label: A Note in Your Hand
fragments.symbol: A note in your own handwriting that you don't remember writing: 'the lighthouse is a test — don't tell her you know.'

fragments.label: Maya, Watching
fragments.text: Maya is rendered into this memory too, standing on the shore. She isn't supposed to be inside a subject's reconstruction. She doesn't acknowledge it.

fragments.label: A Second You
fragments.text: Faint, at the cliff edge: another Keeper, looking out at the same impossible light. They were here before you. The Archive cut them from the record.

interpretations.label: Report the discarded note to Maya
Say nothing — keep what you saw
